docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY MCGUINN, CYNTHIA AS TO DEFENDANT PATTON, RAYMOND V. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-23-2008 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED JUL-24-2008, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT PATTON, RAYMOND V.
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-23-2008 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-23-2008 BY PAUL SLAVIT. BOTH PARTIES PRESENT. EXHIBITS FROM BOTH SIDES RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-23-2008 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MCGUINN, CYNTHIA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PATTON, RAYMOND V. $7,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $162.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $7,662.50, ENFORCMENT OF JUDGMENT IS STAYED FOR 60 DAYS FROM DATE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT. STAY OF ENFORCMENT DOES NOT EXTEND OR MODIFY REQUIREMENT FOR FILING AN APPEAL. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED

SUBPOENA DUCES TECUM ISSUED TO RAYMOND V. PATTON 18 CROW CANYON COURT, SUITE 325, SAN RAMON, CA 94583
SMALL CLAIMS OEX CALENDAR OF JUL-16-2009 IS OFF CALENDAR - NO APPEARANCES.
